## Problem

What limitation or gap does this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior or interface.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why they don't work as well.

## Impact

Which module(s) does this affect? (ai-agent, backend, frontend)
